title: cyrtochilum hastatum
intro: Cyrtochilum hastatum, also known as the hastate Cyrtochilum, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in South America, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyrtochilum hastatum include its potential to treat fever, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antiviral agent. Cyrtochilum hastatum can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine to create ointments and salves for topical application.
